description: Datasets is a library for easily accessing and sharing datasets for Audio, Computer Vision, and NLP tasks.

documentation.example: from datasets import load_dataset; print(load_dataset('squad', split='train[:1]'))
documentation.how_to_use: Run the primary entrypoint as shown in upstream docs, e.g. `cd toolboxes/datasets && python3 datasets.py --target $KFIOSA_TARGET_HOST`. Further invocations from upstream: `cd toolboxes/datasets && python3 datasets.py --help`; `cd toolboxes/datasets && python3 datasets.py --help`. HuggingFace Datasets (one-line data loaders).
documentation.when_to_use: Use during the 'any' phase against surfaces [web] in the ai category. Fits when the engagement needs: HuggingFace Datasets (one-line data loaders).
documentation.why_to_use: Prefer this tool because: HuggingFace Datasets (one-line data loaders).

metadata.example: from datasets import load_dataset; print(load_dataset('squad', split='train[:1]'))
